en: Hi everyone. Wanna beautify your way of speaking English? Then follow this.
Don't say, Have you fall asleep? Instead say, Have you nodded off?
Don't say, I am busy. Instead say, I am swapped.
Don't say, Why are you so angry? Instead say, Why are you so pissed off?
Don't say, Let's meet today. Instead say, Let's catch up today.
Don't say, I am very happy. Instead say, I am over the moon.
Don't say, I am not entrusted in this work. Instead say, This work is not my cup of tea.
